meta.title: Ciprnode - Cosmic Index of Public Resources
meta.description: A decentralized search index for public resources.

error.noscript: Using ECMAScript/JavaScript is not optional here because this is a simple client for a diverse network of resources. Without scripting, fetching is not possible. For instance, this tool becomes useless in those conditions.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Cipr is a decentralized network for indexing public resources.
faq.a2: A ciprnode is a server that runs the Cipr software and hosts a portion of the index.
faq.a3: Use the search bar on the homepage to find indexed resources.
faq.a4: You can contribute by running a node or developing the software.
faq.a5: Follow the installation guide in the official documentation.
faq.a7: Remove the application directory and service configuration.
faq.a8: Visit the community forums or check the documentation.

source.title: Source Code
source.content: The source code is open and available.
